description: Flarehawk is a security operations platform that ingests telemetry from tools such as edge, gateway, and application sources, groups suspicious activity into incidents, and helps teams investigate and remediate issues. It also provides analytics, logs, and asset- and incident-oriented workflows for monitored organizations.
summary: flarehawk.com exposes an OAuth-protected HTTP API at https://app.flarehawk.com with an OpenAPI spec, plus a streamable-HTTP MCP server at https://app.flarehawk.com/mcp; no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
